name.label: Mixpanel Instance Name
name.description: The name for the new mixpanel instance that you want created.

api_host.label: API Host
api_host.description: The Mixpanel API host to send data to.

autocapture.label: Autocapture
autocapture.description: Enable or disable Mixpanel autocapture functionality. Select "Custom" to specify fine grained control over which events are autocaptured.

choices.label: URL with Path and Query String

capture_text_content.label: Autocapture Capture Text Content
capture_text_content.description: Capture text content of elements in autocaptured events

cross_subdomain_cookie.label: Cross Subdomain Cookie
cross_subdomain_cookie.description: Enable or disable cross subdomain cookies for Mixpanel.

persistence.label: Persistence Method
persistence.description: Set the persistence method for Mixpanel (cookie or localStorage).

track_marketing.label: Track Marketing Campaigns
track_marketing.description: Enable or disable tracking of marketing campaigns in Mixpanel. Includes UTM parameters and click identifiers for various ad platforms.

cookie_expiration.label: Cookie Expiration (days)
cookie_expiration.description: Set the cookie expiration time in days for Mixpanel cookies.

disable_persistence.label: Disable Persistence
disable_persistence.description: Disable all persistence mechanisms for Mixpanel.

ip.label: Send IP Address
ip.description: Enable or disable sending IP address information to Mixpanel.

record_block_class.label: Record Block Class
record_block_class.description: CSS class to block elements from being recorded in session recordings.

record_block_selector.label: Record Block Selector
record_block_selector.description: CSS selector to block elements from being recorded in session recordings.

record_canvas.label: Record Canvas
record_canvas.description: Enable or disable recording of canvas elements in session recordings.

record_heatmap_data.label: Record Heatmap Data
record_heatmap_data.description: Enable or disable tracking of heatmap events in session recordings.

record_idle_timeout_ms.label: Record Idle Timeout (ms)
record_idle_timeout_ms.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds for session recordings.

record_mask_text_class.label: Record Mask Text Class
record_mask_text_class.description: CSS class to mask text elements in session recordings.

record_mask_text_selector.label: Record Mask Text Selector
record_mask_text_selector.description: CSS selector to mask text elements in session recordings.

record_max_ms.label: Record Max (ms)
record_max_ms.description: Maximum recording time in milliseconds for session recordings.

record_min_ms.label: Record Min (ms)
record_min_ms.description: Minimum recording time in milliseconds for session recordings.

record_sessions_percent.label: Record Sessions Percent
record_sessions_percent.description: Percentage of sessions to record for session recordings.

track.title: Track
track.description: Sync Segment track events to Mixpanel.

event_name.label: Event Name
event_name.description: The name of the event to track in Mixpanel.

properties.label: Event Properties
properties.description: Properties to associate with the event.

unique_id.label: Unique ID
unique_id.description: The unique ID to associate with the user. Settings this value will trigger a Mixpanel identify call before immediately the track event is sent.

user_profile_properties_to_set.label: User Profile Properties to Set
user_profile_properties_to_set.description: User Profile Properties to set on the user profile in Mixpanel.

first_name.label: First Name
first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The last name of the user.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The phone number of the user.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.description: The avatar URL of the user.

created.label: Created
created.description: The creation date of the user profile.

user_profile_properties_to_set_once.label: User Profile Properties to Set Once
user_profile_properties_to_set_once.description: User Profile Properties to set once on the user profile in Mixpanel. Values which get set once cannot be overwritten later.

user_profile_properties_to_increment.label: User Profile Properties to Increment
user_profile_properties_to_increment.description: User Profile Properties to increment on the user profile in Mixpanel. Values must be numeric.

group_details.label: Group Details
group_details.description: Details for the group to be created or updated in Mixpanel. Setting this value will trigger a Mixpanel set_group call before the track event is sent.

group_key.label: Group Key
group_key.description: The Group Key / type of group to associate with the user. This group key should already be defined in your Mixpanel project.

group_id.label: Group ID
group_id.description: The unique ID to associate with the group.

group_profile_properties_to_set.label: Group properties to Set
group_profile_properties_to_set.description: Group Profile Properties to set on the group in Mixpanel.

group_profile_properties_to_set_once.label: Group properties to set once
group_profile_properties_to_set_once.description: Group Profile Properties to set once on the group profile in Mixpanel. Values which get set once cannot be overwritten later.

group_profile_properties_to_union.label: Group list properties to union
group_profile_properties_to_union.description: Merge a list into a list group property. Duplicates will be removed.

list_name.label: List Name
list_name.description: The name of the list property to union values into.

string_values.label: Values
string_values.description: An array of string values to merge into the list. Non string lists cannot be updated. Duplicates will be removed.

alias.title: Alias
alias.description: Sync alias data to Mixpanel. Use this to replace a Unique ID with a new one.

alias.label: Alias ID
alias.description: The new ID to associate with the user.

original.label: Original ID
original.description: The original ID to associate with the user.
